title: Utilities spending alert
description: Your Utilities budget is 86% utilized with 12 days left this month. At the current rate, you'll exceed your $250 limit by ~$16. Consider delaying non-critical subscriptions to next cycle.

title: Strong savings momentum
description: You're on track to save $5,646 this month — 12% higher than your 6-month average. Redirecting 20% of that surplus into your emergency fund would reach your 6-month target by August.

title: Food spending is healthy
description: Food expenses are $161 vs. a $400 budget — well within range. You've reduced dining-out frequency by 3 visits compared to May, which saved approximately $45.

title: Diversify your income streams
description: Freelance income this month ($850) represents 16% of total earnings. Increasing this to 25% over 3 months could buffer any salary volatility and accelerate your investment contributions.
